name: Daube De Boeuf Aux Pruneaux (Beef Stew with Prunes)
recipeIngredient: 250 grams prunes, pitted and soaked in cognac
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the beef.
2. Marinate overnight in wine, with 1 onion cut into wedges, sliced carrots, cinnamon, ginger, a whole clove, salt, paprika, and additional red wine.
3. Chop the remaining onions.
4. Dry the meat with paper towels.
5. Cook the chopped onions in butter until transparent in a Dutch oven.
6. Sear the beef in butter over high heat in a skillet, a few slices at a time, and transfer them to the Dutch oven. Cook until all liquid has evaporated from the meat.
7. Strain the marinade into the pot with the meat.
8. Cover the pan and cook on low heat for 3 hours.
9. Thirty minutes before finishing cooking, add peeled, seeded, and chopped tomatoes.
10. Five minutes before serving, add the prunes.
11. Serve the meat sprinkled with almonds and sesame seeds.
